name: THE WAKESIDE BAR AND GRILL LLC

violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The upright reach in cooler in the kitchen had products temping between 49 and 54 degrees. Fish temped at 50 degrees. The thermometer inside said it was 60 degrees and the outside varied between 47 and 50 during the inspection. The unit was also iced over at the top. This cooler is not maintaining below 41 degrees.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The ceiling and light around the vents in the prep area need to be cleaned. The floor in the basement walk in freezer needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
